title: what I EAT in a busy week in NYC | high protein & balanced recipes

questions.question: What does 'a rotation of different meals' mean in this context?
options: A) A cycle of repeating the same meal
B) A variety of different meals that replace each other
C) A circular arrangement of food
D) A combination of meals mixed together
questions.explanation: 在这个上下文中，'rotation'指的是轮换、交替的意思。视频中作者说早餐有不同的餐点轮换，意味着她每天会吃不同的早餐，而不是总吃同一种。

questions.question: What does 'time consuming' mean in the video?
options: B) Taking a lot of time
questions.explanation: 视频中提到制作胡萝卜沙拉时切胡萝卜比较耗时。'Time consuming'是一个形容词，意思是耗费时间的、需要花很长时间的。

questions.question: What is 'feta cheese' mentioned in the video?
options: B) A Greek cheese made from sheep's milk
questions.explanation: 视频中多次提到在鸡蛋和沙拉中添加feta cheese（羊奶酪）。Feta是一种传统的希腊奶酪，由羊奶制成，通常呈白色块状，味道略带咸味。

questions.question: What does 'on a whim' mean in this context?
options: B) Suddenly or without much thought
questions.explanation: 视频中说'decided to add some' on a whim，表示作者一时兴起、突发奇想地添加了某些食材。这个短语意思是凭冲动或突然的想法做某事。

questions.question: What is 'kimchi' as mentioned in the video?
options: A) A Korean fermented vegetable dish
questions.explanation: 视频中提到you take a good amount of kimchi，kimchi是韩国泡菜，是一种传统的韩国发酵食品，通常由白菜或萝卜腌制而成，含有益生菌。

questions.question: What does 'incorporates into' mean in the sentence?
questions.explanation: 视频中说'incorporates into the eggs well'，意思是很好地融入到鸡蛋中。这个短语表示将某物混合或纳入到另一物中，使其成为整体的一部分。

questions.question: What does 'refreshing' mean when describing a dish?
questions.explanation: 视频中it is very refreshing表示这道菜非常清爽。Refreshing通常用来形容食物或饮料给人清新、提神的感觉，特别是在炎热天气或吃完油腻食物后。

questions.question: What does 'ribboning the carrots' refer to?
options: A) Cutting carrots into thin strips
questions.explanation: 视频中提到the most time consuming part was ribboning the carrots。Ribboning是一种切菜技法，将胡萝卜切成细长的条状，看起来像丝带一样。

questions.question: What is the speaker's usual seasoning for chicken thighs?
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到with some chicken thighs that I seasoned with my usual Trader Joe's onion salt，作者说她用Trader Joe's的洋葱盐来腌制鸡腿肉。

questions.question: What does 'a mix of' mean in this context?
options: B) A combination of different things
questions.explanation: 视频开头说a mix of scrambled eggs with different ingredients，意思是将不同配料与炒鸡蛋混合在一起。'A mix of'表示混合、组合的意思。

questions.question: What is 'probiotics' mentioned in the video?
options: B) Live beneficial bacteria for gut health
questions.explanation: 视频中提到your probiotics nice and early，probiotics是益生菌，是对健康有益的活菌，主要存在于发酵食品中，有助于肠道健康。

questions.question: What does 'crispy lettuce' refer to?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到I plated everything on a bed of crispy lettuce，crispy lettuce指新鲜脆爽的生菜，通常用于沙拉或作为盘底装饰。

questions.question: What does 'come together' mean in cooking context?
questions.explanation: 视频中说came together quite quickly，意思是这道菜很快就做好了/食材很快就融合在一起。这个短语在烹饪中表示食材准备就绪或菜品制作完成。

questions.question: What is the speaker's attitude toward the carrot salad recipe?
options: A) She thinks it's too complicated
B) She has been wanting to make it for a while
C) She doesn't like raw carrots
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到I've been wanting to make this carrot salad recipe，作者说她一直想做这个胡萝卜沙拉食谱，表达了对这道菜的期待。

questions.question: What does 'skeptical' mean in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中说I'm skeptical that it might not be good，意思是作者对这食物持怀疑态度，觉得它可能没那么好吃。Skeptical表示怀疑的、不确定的。

questions.question: What kind of protein dish is mentioned for lunch?
questions.explanation: 视频中多次提到鸡肉大腿作为蛋白质来源，特别是用Trader Joe's洋葱盐调味的鸡腿肉，是午餐的主要蛋白质来源。

questions.question: What does 'get started on' mean in this context?
questions.explanation: 视频中I got started on those early表示作者很早就开始做那些事情（可能是牛排或其他食材）。这个短语意思是开始着手做某事。

questions.question: What does 'in terms of' mean when used in the video?
questions.explanation: 视频中说in terms of like slicing the carrots，意思是关于切胡萝卜这方面。'In terms of'是一个短语，意思是就...而言、在...方面。

questions.question: What is 'boiled eggs' in the video?
options: B) Eggs cooked in boiling water
questions.explanation: 视频中提到of your boiled eggs，boiled eggs就是水煮蛋，是把鸡蛋放在沸水中煮熟的一种烹饪方式。

questions.question: Describe your typical high-protein breakfast based on what you learned from the video.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频内容描述典型的高蛋白早餐。
questions.referenceAnswer: Include: 1) Scrambled eggs or protein pancake 2) Added ingredients like feta cheese, chives 3) Toast on the side 4) Rotation of different meals
questions.hint: Think about: What protein foods were mentioned? How were they prepared? What toppings or sides were added?

questions.question: What are some tips mentioned in the video for making a good carrot salad?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频内容描述制作胡萝卜沙拉的技巧。
questions.referenceAnswer: Include: 1) Ribboning the carrots (cutting into thin strips) 2) Using vinegar and hot water 3) Dressing with hands for best taste 4) Adding green onions
questions.hint: Consider: What specific techniques were used? What ingredients were added? How long did it take?

questions.question: What does the speaker recommend for adding flavor to dishes?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频内容描述增加菜肴风味的建议。
questions.referenceAnswer: Include: 1) Using Trader Joe's onion salt for chicken 2) Adding feta cheese 3) Putting salt and pepper on top 4) Adding chopped chives
questions.hint: Think about: What seasonings and toppings were mentioned? Which ingredients were emphasized?

questions.question: If you were planning a week's worth of high-protein meals in NYC, what would you include based on this video?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频内容规划一周的高蛋白餐食。
questions.referenceAnswer: Include: 1) Breakfast options: scrambled eggs, protein pancakes 2) Lunch: chicken thighs with seasoning, carrot salad 3) Snacks: kimchi, boiled eggs 4) At farmers market: fresh tomatoes
questions.hint: Consider: What meals were shown? What ingredients were purchased? What recipes were highlighted?

questions.question: What does 'a must' mean in the video when talking about the tuna?
questions.explanation: 视频中说I think this is a must because that tuna quality is...，意思是作者认为这是必须的/必不可少的。'A must'是一个固定表达，意思是必不可少的东西。

questions.question: What does 'ran out of' mean in this context?
questions.explanation: 视频中说I just kind of like ran out of skin care，意思是作者的护肤品用完了。'Ran out of'是一个短语，意思是用完、耗尽。
